title: No One and Nothing
overview: At the dawn of a fatherhood that is refused to him, Jean, an orphan who has been involved in delinquency and is now repentant, decides to leave everything behind by stealing from the godfather who had protected him until then.

trailers.title: RIEN NI PERSONNE de Gallien Guibert - Bande-Annonce
